name: swarm-office-server
comment: Deps PINNED to exact versions (supply-chain hardening; see repo CLAUDE.md). server `colyseus` and client `@colyseus/sdk` MUST stay on the same 0.17.x line — the Schema binary wire protocol is version-locked, so a mismatch causes SILENT deserialization (fields arrive undefined), not a clean error. Install with `npm ci`.
